payment fees.summary: High fees are usually an interchange + markup problem. Start with your effective rate.

chargebacks.summary: Most chargebacks are preventable. Pre-authorization, clear descriptors, and fast response win disputes.

instant settlement.summary: Instant settlement options vary by processor. Square, Stripe Instant, and crypto settle fastest.

stripe payout.summary: Pending payouts are usually rolling reserve or verification holds. Check your dashboard for flags.

stripe.summary: Stripe issues usually fall into Radar blocking, webhook failures, or payout holds.

payment declined.summary: High decline rates often signal Radar friction or card type issues — check your radar rules first.

crypto payment.summary: Stablecoin rails (USDC on Solana) give instant settlement with no chargeback risk.

ai automation.summary: Start with one automation (missed-call text-back is the fastest ROI) before building complex flows.

ai automation restaurant.summary: For restaurants: reservation reminders, review triggers, and waitlist texts are the easiest wins.

ai automation contractor.summary: For contractors: missed-call text-back wins jobs while you're on site.

ai automation hvac.summary: For HVAC: service reminders and after-hours lead capture are highest ROI.

zapier.summary: Zapier failures are usually webhook timeouts or auth expiry. Check the task history for the error.

webhook.summary: Webhook failures: check signature verification, payload size limits, and endpoint response time.

make.com.summary: Make.com errors usually appear in the scenario execution log — look for the first red bubble.

no show.summary: Text reminders 48h + 2h before cut no-shows by 30–50% across most service businesses.

calendar booking.summary: Double-booking usually means calendar sync is broken. Check Calendly / Google Cal sync settings.

email deliverability.summary: Deliverability drops usually signal SPF/DKIM misconfiguration or a sudden spike in bounce rate.

crm.summary: CRM issues usually trace to field mapping or permissions. Export a test record to confirm data flow.

hubspot.summary: HubSpot form issues: check the form embed version and CORS settings if submissions silently fail.

quickbooks.summary: QuickBooks sync breaks after token expiry. Reconnect from Settings > Apps > Connected Services.

google ads.summary: Destination mismatch disapprovals: make sure the landing page URL in the ad matches the final URL exactly.

software selection.summary: Before buying: confirm it works with your current tools and has a real cancellation path.

should i use ai.summary: Use AI where the task is repetitive, the input is predictable, and mistakes are recoverable.

switch processor.summary: Switch signals: effective rate above 2.9%, repeated unexplained holds, or poor dispute support.

prediction market.summary: Prediction markets (Kalshi, Polymarket) price probability in real time — useful for macro risk reads.

openai.summary: Rate limit errors: check your tier limits in the OpenAI dashboard and add exponential backoff.

dns.summary: DNS changes take 15 min – 48h. Use dnschecker.org to verify propagation worldwide.
